description: Santa Homer Simpson animatronic — mechanical repair, electronics repair, and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
Santa Homer Simpson animatronics are licensed seasonal tie-in collectibles combining The Simpsons branding with Christmas novelty motion toys. Most examples date to 2000s-era character-merch waves where pop-culture mascots were adapted into festive decor.

Typical construction includes molded plastic components, textile Santa costume elements, and a battery-operated motor/sound assembly. Market value is strongest for clearly licensed, fully functional units with intact paint and costume parts, particularly in original packaging.
